landing.title: What do you want to know?
landing.optionsHint: Leave empty for a pure Q&A poll with no voting – SimpleVoter will only collect answers via the questions feature.

features.title: How it works
features.zeroFrictionText: No sign-up, no account. Type your question, add options, done — in under a minute.
features.liveText: Participants see votes as they come in, in real time — you decide when and for whom.
features.qaText: The speech-bubble icon lets participants submit questions that appear right away.
features.shareText: One link or QR code is all it takes. Works in five languages, on any device.

manage.manageLinkWarning: Don't share this link publicly — it grants full access to the poll.
manage.pausedHint: Poll is paused – participants see a notice that it hasn't started yet.
manage.resetConfirm: Really delete all votes and questions for this poll permanently? The question and options are kept.

public.resultsHiddenUntilVote: Results will show once you've voted.
public.resultsHiddenUntilClosed: Results will show once the poll closes.
public.pollClosed: This poll hasn't started yet. Please wait until it begins.
public.noQuestionsYet: No questions yet. Be the first!
public.noOptionsHint: This poll collects opinions rather than votes. Use the speech-bubble icon above to respond.

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
